addition.item: Install script now functional including changelog

remove.item: changelog comments for Simple iCal Block module in file headers

change.item: Changes to layout in default.php - alternating shading to items on same day, position of time and location

language.item: Updates and changes are only made to en-GB using prefix XBSICAL_

note.item: xbSimple-iCal is based on Simple iCal Block by A.H.C. Waasdorp. Original project on GitHub
for Documentation see tab on Module Config page and README.md file on GitHub
Raise bugs and feature requests on GitHub

change.item: Changes to layout in default.php - alternating shading to items on same day, position of time and location

language.item: Updates and changes are only made to en-GB

note.item: xbSimple-iCal is based on Simple iCal Block by A.H.C. Waasdorp. Original project on GitHub
for Documentation see tab on Config page and README.md file on README.md file on GitHub
Raise bugs and feature requests on GitHub
